channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Army cautiously restarts Ajax vehicle trials after safety concerns investigation
item.description: The British Army is set to cautiously resume trials of its Ajax armoured vehicles following a pause triggered by reports of illness among soldiers. Testing was halted in November after around 30 perso...

item.title: House Justice Committee Unanimously Finds Probable Cause to Impeach Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The House committee on justice unanimously voted on April 29, 2026 to find probable cause to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte. With 53 members present and no objections, the panel determined that t...

item.title: President Zardari visits Mao Zedong's hometown in Shaoshan and arrives in Sanya for CPEC talks and submarine commissioning
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari, during his official visit to China, went to Shaoshan, the hometown of Chairman Mao Zedong, the founder of the People's Republic of China. There, he laid a wreath at the Sta...

item.title: Science-Backed Tips for Managing Hay Fever and Seasonal Allergies
item.description: Hay fever, or allergic rhinitis, affects around 400 million people worldwide, causing symptoms like sneezing, runny nose, and itchy eyes. The article explains that both the prevalence and severity of ...

item.title: NT Police find child's underwear and clothing items during search for missing five-year-old Sharon Granites in Alice Springs
item.description: In today's episode of The Nightly's Newsworthy segment, host Ben O'Shea discusses several current affairs stories making headlines across Australia. The main focus is the ongoing search for five-year-...

item.title: Red Sox Revamp Coaching Staff with Internal Promotions After Firing Alex Cora and Six Coaches
item.description: The Boston Red Sox continued rebuilding their coaching staff on the second day under interim manager Chad Tracy following the dismissal of manager Alex Cora and six members of his coaching staff. The ...

item.title: FSSAI drafts rules to ban plastic packaging for pan masala, gutka and tobacco products
item.description: The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) has released a draft amendment to the Food Safety and Standards (Packaging) Regulations, 2018, proposing a complete ban on plastic packaging fo...

item.title: Federal spring fiscal update shows smaller deficit thanks to higher oil prices, but Alberta oil and gas investment awaits MOU clarity
item.description: The federal government released its spring economic and fiscal update on Tuesday, reporting a better-than-expected deficit of $66.9 billion for 2025-26, which is $11.5 billion lower than the November ...

item.title: Iten-Kabarnet Road Closed Due to Rain-Triggered Landslide Near Kolol Area
item.description: The Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) has announced the complete closure of a section of the Iten-Kabarnet Road following a landslide that occurred near the Kolol area on 29 April 2026. The in...

item.title: Report Shows Many Babies Under Two Have Significant Daily Screen Time Despite Official Guidance
item.description: A recent report highlights concerning levels of screen exposure among the youngest children. More than two-thirds of babies under the age of two use screens regularly, with some spending up to eight h...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise as UAE Plans OPEC Exit and US Tightens Iran Blockade
item.description: Oil price don continue to rise as global market dey react to two major developments: United Arab Emirates decision to leave OPEC and fresh tension around Iran oil supply. UAE, wey be one of the top oi...

item.title: PETAN Urges Indigenous Oil Firms to Attract Investment and Build Global Partnerships
item.description: The Petroleum Technology Association of Nigeria (PETAN) has charged its members, which are indigenous oil and gas service companies, to step up efforts in attracting both local and foreign investments...

item.title: UK Nuclear Industry Increases Lobbying of Scottish MSPs Before Holyrood Election
item.description: The UK nuclear industry has significantly ramped up its lobbying efforts targeting Members of the Scottish Parliament (MSPs) in the lead-up to the Holyrood election on May 7, 2026. According to an ana...

item.title: Boksburg court grants R30 000 bail each to suspended EMPD brigadier and Ekurhuleni city manager
item.description: Suspended Ekurhuleni Metropolitan Police Department deputy chief Brigadier Julius Mkhwanazi and Ekurhuleni City Manager Kagiso Lerutla appeared in the Boksburg Magistrates’ Court on Tuesday where each...

item.title: House Justice Committee Finds Probable Cause in Impeachment Complaints Against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The House of Representatives justice committee has unanimously voted to declare that probable cause exists to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte. In a 53-0 vote on April 29, 2026, the panel advanced ...

item.title: Telemedicine Offers Pakistani Women Doctors Path Back to Work
item.description: A significant challenge facing Pakistan is the loss of skilled female medical professionals leaving the workforce after marriage or due to systemic barriers. Gallup surveys and doctor associations rev...

item.title: Yaba Residents Protest Over Prolonged Power Outages Amid National Electricity Challenges
item.description: People wey dey live for Yaba, Lagos, don waka go the Ikeja Electricity Distribution Company (IEDC) office dey protest say dem no dey get regular power supply. The communities of Abule Oja and Abule Ij...

item.title: Federal High Court Confirms FCCPC Authority Over Medical Negligence Cases
item.description: The Federal High Court for Abuja don finally confirm say the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Commission (FCCPC) get authority to check any complaint wey concern medical negligence. This na...

item.title: Fire Breaks Out In Ghaziabad Flat, Spreads Across Floors, Causes Panic Among Residents
item.description: A major fire erupted in a residential flat in Indirapuram, Ghaziabad, causing considerable panic among the residents of the building. The blaze, which started in one apartment, quickly spread to other...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh SSC 2026 Results Announcement and Access Details
item.description: The Andhra Pradesh government has announced that the results of the Secondary School Certificate (SSC) examinations for March 2026 will be declared on Thursday, 30th April 2026 at 11 a.m. According to...
